title: Laboratory Assistant - Research & Development
description:
Primary Objectives of the Position

Support day-to-day laboratory operations in strict accordance with SOPs, under close supervision.


Major Responsibilities

  1. Assist in the compounding, application and sampling of flavour according to formula allocation by supervisor.
  2. Participate in sensory evaluation and discussion of prototypes applied with supervisor when necessary.
  3. Utilise in-house database for daily functional task.
  4. Responsible for the general maintenance and consumables of the laboratories.
  5. Support R&D development function in sample preparation of raw materials and flavour samples for sensory testing and evaluation by supervisor.
  6. Contribute to organisational development by supporting continuous improvement projects.

Other Responsibilities

  1. General maintenance of laboratories.
  2. Maintain the cleanliness of work station and safe working environment.
  3. Ensure safe disposal of Raw Materials.

Skills required:

  • Recognised diploma in Food Science / Technology or related discipline.
  • Experience in the relevant industry preferred.
  • Ability to communicate effectively at all levels.
  • Self-motivated.
  • Meticulous, and a good team player.

Other info:

  • Working days is from Monday to Friday, 8:30am - 5:30pm.
  • Frequent shuttle bus service from/to Lakeside MRT and Buroh Lane

postedCompany.description:
At KH Roberts, we craft future flavours that bring delight and imagination to the world. As one of Asia’s leading creators of aromas and tastes, we are constantly pushing the boundaries, always discovering, always innovating.

With world-class research, innovation, and manufacturing capabilities, supported by a keen understanding of Asia’s diverse cultures, tastes and preferences, we bring to our customers crafted flavours that are novel, relevant, and delightful.


For more than 55 years, we have established an extensive network of clients and partners. They range from private labels to multinational consumer companies, serving diverse segments from Foods & Beverages, Health & Wellness to Pharmaceuticals. Headquartered in Singapore with local operating presence across Asia, we serve and support the needs of our customers around the world.


Come visit our Linked in account and Facebook Page:

https://sg.linkedin.com/company/kh-roberts

https://www.facebook.com/KHRobertsGroup
